slides.title: Small *deficit*
slides.body: 300 to 500 calories under. No crash diets.

slides.title: Keep protein *high*
slides.body: High protein protects muscle in a cut.

slides.title: Keep *lifting heavy*
slides.body: Drop the weights and your body drops muscle.

slides.title: Walk it *off*
slides.body: Daily steps burn fat without killing recovery.

slides.title: Go *slow*
slides.body: Aim for 1% of bodyweight a week, max.

slides.title: Cut *clean*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks your deficit, protein and steps automatically.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
